message.content:
Find and read the #injections-section (or .injections, .injections-section) in the mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1 files. I need:
1. The PHP markup from /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/page-mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.php — find the injections section HTML
2. The SCSS from /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/scss/pages/mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.scss — find the injections section styles
3. The JS from /Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/js/pages/mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1.bundle.js — find the injections carousel init code

Return the full relevant code blocks for all three.

content.text: I'll find and read the injections sections from all three files.
